note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Mateo is woken by an unsettling phone call from Dr. Baeza. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo tries to shake off Zoë's unsettling presentation on AI-driven predictive policing. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Mateo discovers an anomaly in the data he's been analyzing for Dr. Baeza. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo discovers an encrypted message from Dr. Baeza on the university server. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Mateo discovers an encrypted message from Dr. Baeza on the university server Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Mateo tries to decipher the meaning behind the strange message Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Mateo receives a cryptic message from an unknown sender about Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Mateo discovers a disturbing anomaly in the lab's data logs. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Mateo discovers a hidden folder on the seminar's shared drive, containing an encrypted file named 'Erebus'. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Mateo discovers a disturbing anomaly in the lab's data logs. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Mateo tries to focus on his presentation but can't shake off the feeling that something is off Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Mateo tries to make sense of Dr. Baeza's cryptic presentation, but his mind keeps drifting back to Zoë's unnerving warning. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Mateo discovers a suspicious discrepancy in the lab's data logs. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo discovers a disturbing anomaly in the lab's data logs. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 15: Mateo discovers a hidden folder on the university server with an ominous name. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 16: Mateo discovers an encrypted message from Dr. Baeza, hinting at a catastrophic event. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 17: Mateo's research on Dr. Baeza's project sparks a disturbing connection to the seminar's strange occurrences. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 18: Mateo's phone buzzed with an encrypted message from an unknown sender. Plants continuity: maintains Mateo Salas POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Static in the Seminar") within Act I tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
